prompt: Here's a CSV export of our customer survey results (survey_results.csv). It has columns for respondent_id, department, satisfaction_score (1-10), response_date, and comments. Can you analyze it and make some charts?

assertions.name: overall-average-score
assertions.description: Report includes average satisfaction score across all respondents

assertions.name: department-comparison-chart
assertions.description: A chart comparing satisfaction by department exists as a PNG

assertions.name: distribution-chart
assertions.description: A distribution chart (histogram or similar) of satisfaction scores exists

assertions.name: identifies-best-worst-departments
assertions.description: The report identifies the highest and lowest performing departments by name

assertions.name: charts-properly-labeled
assertions.description: Charts have titles, axis labels, and readable formatting

assertions.name: score-treated-as-numeric
assertions.description: The report handles the 1-10 scale appropriately (treats as numeric measure, not category)

assertions.name: report-file-saved
assertions.description: report.md file is saved in the output directory
